note: Only verified or partially-verified benchmarks are included. Unverified fields show guidance text only. Every figure traces to a primary source.

fine_exposure.label: Estimated Regulatory Fine Exposure
fine_exposure.description: Maximum regulatory penalty applicable to your sector
fine_exposure.guidance: Enter the maximum penalty your AI system could face under applicable regulation. Use 0 if no regulatory penalty applies.

financial_services.label: FCA — no statutory cap, typical enforcement range

retail_ecommerce_ticketing.label: CMA maximum — Competition Act 1998
retail_ecommerce_ticketing.display: Up to 10% of global annual turnover
retail_ecommerce_ticketing.source: CMA — Guidance on the Appropriate Amount of a Penalty

healthcare.label: CQC enforcement — Health and Social Care Act 2008

real_estate.label: CMA maximum — Competition Act 1998
real_estate.display: Up to 10% of global annual turnover
real_estate.source: CMA — Guidance on the Appropriate Amount of a Penalty

other.label: UK GDPR maximum (if personal data used)

efficiency_gain.label: Expected Efficiency Gain from AI %
efficiency_gain.description: Percentage reduction in cost or time for this process
efficiency_gain.guidance: Enter the percentage reduction in staff time or operational cost you expect from AI automation.

general_benchmark.label: Typical AI implementation range
general_benchmark.source: Google Cloud — Business Impacts of Machine Learning (cited in Reliable Machine Learning, O'Reilly 2022)
general_benchmark.verified_note: Secondary citation — treat as directional range only

media_broadcasting.label: Content moderation — automated review tools
media_broadcasting.source: Ofcom — Online Safety Act Compliance Costs Research 2023
media_broadcasting.verified_note: Ofcom documents efficiency potential — figures are illustrative ranges

financial_services.label: AI-augmented compliance and fraud detection
financial_services.source: FCA — Artificial Intelligence in Financial Services Research Note 2022
financial_services.verified_note: FCA research note — figures are illustrative ranges not primary data

error_reduction.label: Expected Error or Risk Reduction %
error_reduction.description: Percentage reduction in errors, false positives, or risk events
error_reduction.guidance: Enter the percentage reduction in errors, harmful decisions, or risk events you expect from AI.

financial_services.label: Fraud detection — AI-augmented systems
financial_services.source: FCA — Artificial Intelligence in Financial Services Research Note 2022
financial_services.verified_note: FCA research note — figures are illustrative ranges

media_broadcasting.label: Content moderation — false positive reduction
media_broadcasting.source: Ofcom — Online Safety Act Compliance Costs Research 2023
media_broadcasting.verified_note: Ofcom documents error reduction potential — illustrative range

current_annual_cost.label: Current Annual Cost of This Process
current_annual_cost.description: What you spend today on the process this AI system will automate or augment
current_annual_cost.guidance: Include all staff time, tooling, outsourcing, and process costs for this function today. No benchmark is shown for this field — the figure should come from your own cost data.

ai_system_cost.label: AI System Annual Cost
ai_system_cost.description: Total annual cost of the AI system including all licensing, infrastructure, maintenance, and monitoring
ai_system_cost.guidance: Include licensing fees, cloud infrastructure, monitoring tools, and internal engineering time. No benchmark is shown for this field — costs vary significantly by build vs buy and scale.
